user.title: Weishaupt WTC LAN
user.description: Connects directly to the Weishaupt system device (SG) over the local LAN and reads heating data through the CanApiJson JSON interface. No cloud required.

data.enable_extended_experimental_wtc_sensors: Enable extended experimental read-only WTC sensors

names.title: Heating Circuit Names
names.description: Review detected heating-circuit display names and adjust them if needed.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Weishaupt device. Check the IP address and network.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check username and password (default: admin / Admin123).

init.title: Weishaupt WTC LAN
init.description: Adjust polling (10-600 seconds) and heating circuit display names.

data.enable_extended_experimental_wtc_sensors: Enable extended experimental read-only WTC sensors
